subject: Fw: Fwd: FW: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667
body:
----- Original Message -----
From: LVJET@aol.com <LVJET@aol.com>
To: rjalashgar@nysgmail.com <rjalashgar@nysgmail.com>
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com <DKIESQ@aol.com>; Gmax; rkahn@nysgmail.com <rkahn@nysgmail.com>; slancaster@bristolassociates.com <slancaster@bristolassociates.com>
Sent: Mon May 12 11:22:07 2008
Subject: Fwd: FW: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667

MESSAGE FOR JE:  IMPORTANT
Darren, Rhona, Lesley, Rich,
I don't know who is putting messages into JE,
Sean has an offer of 12.3M and feels the buyer would go to 12.6M for S76
see below attachment and please advise how JE would like to proceed.
Darren, I believe this is the Brazilian buyer again.
Larry V




________________________________
